requirement_topic.en: EMC / Radio — Household Refrigerating Appliances (BSTI EMC + BTRC for wireless)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容/无线电——家用制冷器具（BSTI电磁兼容 + 无线功能BTRC）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容/無線電——家用製冷器具（BSTI電磁相容 + 無線功能BTRC）

summary.en: Bangladesh does not operate a single EU-style horizontal EMC Directive for all electrical products. Electromagnetic-compatibility expectations for household appliances are addressed mainly through the Bangladesh Standard (BDS) adopting the relevant IEC/CISPR series where BSTI references them within the product safety/EMC scope — for refrigerators this corresponds to the CISPR 14 family (emission and immunity for household appliances), the IEC equivalents of which BSTI may require within its testing. There is no standalone mandatory CE-equivalent EMC self-declaration regime; EMC is treated as part of BSTI conformity assessment where applicable rather than a separate horizontal mark. Separately, if a refrigerator incorporates wireless connectivity (Wi-Fi or Bluetooth for smart-home features), the radio module must be type-approved/accepted by the Bangladesh Telecommunication Regulatory Commission (BTRC) before import and use, under the Bangladesh Telecommunication Regulation Act, 2001. Plain (non-connected) refrigerators on 220 V / 50 Hz supply do not trigger BTRC radio approval.
summary.zh: 孟加拉国没有像欧盟那样针对所有电气产品的单一横向EMC指令。家用器具的电磁兼容要求主要通过采用相关IEC/CISPR系列的孟加拉国标准（BDS）处理，在BSTI于产品安全/EMC范围内引用时适用——对电冰箱而言对应CISPR 14系列（家用器具的发射与抗扰度），BSTI可在其检测中要求其IEC等同标准。不存在独立的等同CE的强制性EMC自我声明制度；EMC在适用时作为BSTI合格评定的一部分处理，而非独立的横向标志。此外，若电冰箱配备无线连接功能（用于智能家居的Wi-Fi或蓝牙），其无线模块在进口和使用前须经孟加拉国电信监管委员会（BTRC）依据《2001年孟加拉国电信监管法》进行型号核准/接受。采用220 V/50 Hz供电的普通（非联网）电冰箱不触发BTRC无线电核准。
summary.zht: 孟加拉沒有像歐盟那樣針對所有電氣產品的單一橫向EMC指令。家用器具的電磁相容要求主要通過採用相關IEC/CISPR系列的孟加拉標準（BDS）處理，在BSTI於產品安全/EMC範圍內引用時適用——對電冰箱而言對應CISPR 14系列（家用器具的發射與抗擾度），BSTI可在其檢測中要求其IEC等同標準。不存在獨立的等同CE的強制性EMC自我聲明制度；EMC在適用時作為BSTI合格評定的一部分處理，而非獨立的橫向標誌。此外，若電冰箱配備無線連接功能（用於智慧家居的Wi-Fi或藍牙），其無線模組在進口和使用前須經孟加拉電信監管委員會（BTRC）依據《2001年孟加拉電信監管法》進行型號核准/接受。採用220 V/50 Hz供電的普通（非聯網）電冰箱不觸發BTRC無線電核准。

standards_or_laws: BSTI Act, 2018 — basis for BSTI conformity assessment, including EMC aspects where referenced within the relevant BDS
BDS adoption of CISPR 14 series (IEC) — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus (emission / immunity), where applied by BSTI
Bangladesh Telecommunication Regulation Act, 2001 — BTRC type-approval/acceptance for radio modules (only if Wi-Fi / Bluetooth connectivity is present)

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances (including refrigerators) are governed by GB 4343.1-2018 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics — Part 1: Emission; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (Part 2: Immunity; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2), with GB 17625.1 for harmonic emissions. These are enforced under the CCC mandatory certification regime administered by SAMR/CNCA. China and Bangladesh both ultimately reference the CISPR 14 family, so the underlying emission/immunity technical basis is comparable; however, a Chinese CCC EMC test report (GB 4343.1) is not automatically accepted by BSTI, and any wireless module separately certified under China's SRRC radio-type approval is not recognised by BTRC.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具（包括电冰箱）的电磁兼容要求依据GB 4343.1-2018（电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗扰度；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2）执行，谐波发射方面适用GB 17625.1。上述标准在市场监管总局/认证认可监督管理委员会（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC强制认证制度下执行。中国与孟加拉国最终均参考CISPR 14系列，故底层发射/抗扰度技术基础具可比性；但中国CCC电磁兼容检测报告（GB 4343.1）不被BSTI自动接受，依据中国SRRC无线电型号核准单独认证的无线模块亦不被BTRC认可。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具（包括電冰箱）的電磁相容要求依據GB 4343.1-2018（電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗擾度；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2）執行，諧波發射方面適用GB 17625.1。上述標準在市場監管總局/認證認可監督管理委員會（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC強制認證制度下執行。中國與孟加拉最終均參考CISPR 14系列，故底層發射/抗擾度技術基礎具可比性；但中國CCC電磁相容檢測報告（GB 4343.1）不被BSTI自動接受，依據中國SRRC無線電型號核准單獨認證的無線模組亦不被BTRC認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances — Part 1: Emission (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2)
SRRC radio type approval — applicable in China to any wireless module (not recognised by Bangladesh BTRC)

gap.en: Unlike the EU, Bangladesh has no standalone horizontal EMC mark, so the EMC gap is narrower but two points remain: (1) EMC is folded into BSTI conformity assessment where the relevant BDS references the CISPR 14 family — Chinese CCC GB 4343.1 reports are not automatically accepted and BSTI may require its own testing or a BSTI-acceptable IEC/CISPR test report. (2) Wireless models — if the refrigerator has Wi-Fi/Bluetooth, a separate BTRC type-approval/acceptance for the radio module is mandatory before import; Chinese SRRC approval does not transfer. For plain refrigerators with no radio, no BTRC step applies and the EMC obligation is limited to whatever the BSTI safety/EMC assessment requires. Bangladesh does not impose an EU-style separate EMC Declaration of Conformity.
gap.zh: 与欧盟不同，孟加拉国没有独立的横向EMC标志，故EMC差距较小，但仍存两点：（1）当相应BDS引用CISPR 14系列时，EMC并入BSTI合格评定——中国CCC GB 4343.1报告不被自动接受，BSTI可能要求自行检测或提供BSTI可接受的IEC/CISPR检测报告。（2）无线型号——若电冰箱配备Wi-Fi/蓝牙，其无线模块在进口前须单独取得BTRC型号核准/接受；中国SRRC核准不可转移。对于无无线电的普通电冰箱，不涉及BTRC步骤，EMC义务仅限于BSTI安全/EMC评定所要求的内容。孟加拉国不要求欧盟式的独立EMC符合性声明。
gap.zht: 與歐盟不同，孟加拉沒有獨立的橫向EMC標誌，故EMC差距較小，但仍存兩點：（1）當相應BDS引用CISPR 14系列時，EMC併入BSTI合格評定——中國CCC GB 4343.1報告不被自動接受，BSTI可能要求自行檢測或提供BSTI可接受的IEC/CISPR檢測報告。（2）無線型號——若電冰箱配備Wi-Fi/藍牙，其無線模組在進口前須單獨取得BTRC型號核准/接受；中國SRRC核准不可轉移。對於無無線電的普通電冰箱，不涉及BTRC步驟，EMC義務僅限於BSTI安全/EMC評定所要求的內容。孟加拉不要求歐盟式的獨立EMC符合性聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — EMC handled within BSTI conformity assessment where the relevant BDS references CISPR 14; no standalone EMC mark. BTRC radio type-approval is mandatory only for refrigerators with Wi-Fi/Bluetooth connectivity
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 is mandatory (GB) for CCC certification; GB/T 4343.2-2020 is recommended (GB/T); both enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bangladesh has no EU-style horizontal EMC Directive; EMC is addressed within BSTI conformity assessment via the CISPR 14 family where referenced, and Chinese CCC GB 4343.1 data is not automatically accepted. A separate BTRC type-approval is mandatory only if the refrigerator includes Wi-Fi or Bluetooth — plain 220 V / 50 Hz refrigerators do not trigger a radio approval step. Verify BSTI's specific EMC test expectations and any BTRC requirement for connected models before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 孟加拉国没有欧盟式的横向EMC指令；EMC在BSTI合格评定中通过引用的CISPR 14系列处理，中国CCC GB 4343.1数据不被自动接受。仅当电冰箱配备Wi-Fi或蓝牙时才须单独取得BTRC型号核准——采用220 V/50 Hz的普通电冰箱不触发无线电核准步骤。出货前请核实BSTI的具体EMC检测要求及联网型号的BTRC要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 孟加拉沒有歐盟式的橫向EMC指令；EMC在BSTI合格評定中通過引用的CISPR 14系列處理，中國CCC GB 4343.1數據不被自動接受。僅當電冰箱配備Wi-Fi或藍牙時才須單獨取得BTRC型號核准——採用220 V/50 Hz的普通電冰箱不觸發無線電核准步驟。出貨前請核實BSTI的具體EMC檢測要求及聯網型號的BTRC要求。
